releaseNotes: Smarter 'sleep day' bucketing for the Dashboard week card, the Sleep tab list, and the weekly chart. If you fall asleep at 2 am Tuesday, that sleep now counts as Monday night's rest (which it is) instead of leaking into Tuesday's column and inflating Tuesday's total. Daytime naps still count on the day they happened. No setup, no toggle — just the same data, bucketed honestly.
